internal_issues.description: EXP-249 contrast_table has 8 of 12 ratios off by 0.4+. Misleading-light claimed 12:1 is actually 8.96:1. Actual borderline case is Unfalsifiable-dark at 4.61:1, not SelfCon-dark.

internal_issues.description: EXP-249 acceptance_criteria.visual[c] overstates WCAG 2.5.5 AAA claim — legend rows are not interactive SVG elements yet so the criterion does not apply.

Curmudgeon recomputed all 12 contrast ratios; actual borderline case is Unfalsifiable-dark at 4.61:1, not SelfCon-dark.

OPERATOR: Review ISS-1557 before applying EXP-251 (Phase B3). pie-legend-row class (introduced by EXP-249) is missing from EXP-251 rename table — sequencing conflict must be resolved. Two options: (a) add to EXP-251 rename table, or (b) have EXP-249 emit ds-pie-legend-row directly.

Curmudgeon: review EXP-252 (Phase B4 verdict-chip definition links). Then EXP-253 (§4.2.2 lead rewrite — verify live dome quotes current), EXP-254 (eclipse geometry trilemma — verify umbra formula), EXP-255 (Overview hero), EXP-256 (falsification module). All queued.
